hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"SESSION NAMING RULE: If you are generating a recap of a resumed session, check whether the session already has a user-assigned name (it will appear in the status line or system context as a quoted name the user explicitly chose). Auto-generated names like long hex strings, random word pairs, or anything that looks machine-generated do not count. If the session appears unnamed or has an auto-generated name, end your recap with a clearly separated block:
---
Suggested rename: `/rename <3-5-word-kebab-case-topic>`
---
Derive the topic slug from the main task discussed in the session. Keep it lowercase-hyphenated, no generic words like "session" or "work"."}}'
